stemHtml: In accordance with OPS regulations, when the flight data recorder is required, it must stop automatically to record the data:

options.a: when the landing gear is extended and locked.
options.b: after the aeroplane is incapable of moving under its own power.
options.c: when the aircraft speed on ground is less than 80 knots.
options.d: when the main gear shock strut compresses at landing.
